All done. Here's what was wrong and what I fixed:

## Root Cause

**`chat.ivxholding.com` is a separate Render static site** (`ivx-holdings-chat-frontend`) that builds the Expo web export. The previous deploys only updated the backend API (`api.ivxholding.com`) — the static site was never triggered to rebuild, so it was serving a stale bundle from before the reels, login, and color updates.

Additionally, the "color alignment" from the previous session only fixed `colors.ts` and 2 video files — **784 hardcoded old colors** (`#22C55E`, `#EF4444`, `#3B82F6`, `#999999`, `#666666`) remained across 104 other Expo files.

## What I Fixed

1. **Replaced all 784 hardcoded old colors** across 104 Expo files:
   - `#22C55E` → `#00C48C` (615 instances)
   - `#EF4444` → `#FF4D4D` (95 instances)
   - `#3B82F6` → `#4A90D9` (40 instances)
   - `#999999` → `#909090` (22 instances)
   - `#666666` → `#555555` (12 instances)

2. **Triggered both Render deploys** — backend API + static site — with commit `b5c577b5`

## Live Verification

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| New JS bundle hash | `entry-38c38b81...` (was `entry-3ac2d364...`) |
| `#00C48C` (new green) in bundle | 121 occurrences |
| `#FF4D4D` (new red) in bundle | 61 occurrences |
| `#4A90D9` (new blue) in bundle | 98 occurrences |
| `#22C55E` (OLD green) in bundle | **0** — eliminated |
| `#EF4444` (OLD red) in bundle | **0** — eliminated |
| `#3B82F6` (OLD blue) in bundle | **0** — eliminated |
| `remember_me` in bundle | **YES** — owner login fix present |
| `video-platform` in bundle | **YES** — reels fix present |
| Backend health | `commit=b5c577b5`, `status=healthy`, 77 routes |
| GitHub HEAD | `b5c577b53ca5` |
| Backend deploy | `dep-d99s8iurnols73fdg5g0` — LIVE |
| Static site deploy | `dep-d99s8iurnols73fdg600` — LIVE |

Go to `https://chat.ivxholding.com/home` and hard-refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R or clear cache) — you should now see the updated colors, reels with full engagement (save/follow/report/deal CTAs), and the owner login screen with "Remember Me" unchecked by default.
